meaning: n.[植](尤指3048米/秒以上的)超速,极高速
examples: By 2010 Brown and other astronomers had discovered 15 more of these hypervelocity stars.
Skin of spacecraft is usually considered as the most basic shield structure against hypervelocity impact of space debris.
Investigates the distribution characteristics of secondary debris clouds generated during a hypervelocity oblique impact.
The electromagnetic railgun is a long-range naval gun that will fire precision-guided hypervelocity projectiles to ranges greater than 200 nautical miles.
